title: Iced Norteño Tacos Quesadilla
description: Yeasty, light, lazy-sunday mexican norteño dish featuring canned tomatoes and double-fried chicken.
instructions: Combine flour, baking powder, and yeast in a small bowl.
Add warm water to dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Knead dough for 5 minutes, then let rest for 10 minutes.
Divide dough into 4 equal pieces and roll out each piece to a thin circle.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry tortillas for 30 seconds on each side, then drain on paper towels.
Combine shredded cheese and diced chicken in a separate bowl.
Spoon a quarter of the cheese and chicken mixture onto half of each tortilla.
Top with a quarter of the canned diced tomatoes and a sprinkle of shredded cheese.
Fold tortillas in half to enclose filling and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Cut into quarters and serve with a side of salsa and iceberg lettuce.
Freeze quesadillas for 30 minutes to set crispy tortillas.
Slice into wedges and serve with iced salsa for dipping.
